name: ixoncdkingress

metadata.name: ixoncdkingress
metadata.summary: IXON CDK Ingress used in Cloud Functions for the IXON Cloud

documentation:
# IXON CDK Ingress

The ixoncdkingress package provides the interface between the IXON Cloud and your Cloud Function.

Learn more about how to develop Cloud Functions on https://developer.ixon.cloud/docs/.

modules.name: ixoncdkingress.utils
documentation: Module containing utility functions

functions.name: ixoncdkingress.utils.handle_exception
documentation: Shows the error with traceback in the console and sets the response status code to 500.

modules.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.request
documentation: Cloud Function request module.

classes.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.request.Request

methods.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.request.Request.parse_body
documentation:
Parses the request body according to the `content_type`.

Must only be called once.
Represents an HTTP request, containing headers and optionally a body

modules.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.utils
documentation: Utility functions.

functions.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.utils.read_qs_as_dict
documentation:
Reads and parses the URL query string, returns it as a dict with for each value only the first
occurrence.

functions.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.utils.parse_function_location
documentation: Parses the full function path into a module path and a function name.

functions.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.utils._parse_context_values
documentation:
Parses expected context_items into FunctionResources
and discards any unexpected context_items.

functions.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.utils.parse_json_input
documentation:
Parses an application/json request body string into a context, function
location and function arguments.

functions.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.utils.setup_mongo_container
documentation:
Sets up a development MongoDB when not in production mode.

Will create a docker container named: `ixon-cloud-function-mongo`. The mongodb will be
accessable at the configured port with user: `root` and password: `mongo-root`

Returns the created container so that it can be removed on exit.

functions.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.utils.shutdown_mongo_container
documentation: Tears down and removes the earlier created DocumentDB container

documentation: Main application to give to a WSGI-capable (HTTP) server

functions.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.wsgi.do_servlet_method
documentation: Calls the Servlet method specified by the `request.request_method`

functions.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.wsgi.start_error_response
documentation: Creates a new Response producing an error response

functions.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.wsgi.run_server
documentation: Runs the WGSI server with the given provider

functions.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.wsgi.raise_ki_on_signal
documentation:
Raises a KeyboardInterrupt

For use in signal handling

functions.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.wsgi.run_server_wsgiref
documentation: Runs the server using the wsgi reference application

documentation: Generates and renders the CDK Ingress HTML form

functions.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.form._generate_form_document
documentation: Generates the CDK Ingress HTML form document

functions.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.form._custom_properties
documentation: Generates a form fragment for custom properties.

functions.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.form._permissions
documentation: Generates a form fragment for permissions.

documentation: Generates a form fragment for a context resource.

Parses an application/x-www-form-urlencoded request body string into a context, function

variables.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.form.HAS_DOMINATE
documentation: pragma: no cover

modules.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.config
documentation: Contains the configuration for the ixoncdkingress webserver

functions.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.config.load_str_file
documentation: Loads a string from a file, returns default if no path is given

functions.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.config.load_json_file
documentation:
Loads a Dict from a JSON file, converting all numeric values to string. Returns default if no
path is given, file_path does not exist, or file_path does not contain a JSON file.

functions.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.config.load_context_values
documentation:
Loads context values from a config file. First checks the file specified by
CONTEXT_VALUES_PATH environment variable, then loads it as JSON into a dict.
If that file does not exist, checks the file specified by
CONTEXT_CONFIG_PATH environment variable, then loads it as JSON into a dict
and returns only the 'values' field. It also writes the values as JSON to a
file at CONTEXT_VALUES_PATH for future invocations.

classes.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.config.InvalidConfigException
documentation: Exception for invalid values in the config

classes.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.config.WsgiProvider
documentation: Provider to use to turn a WSGI application into a (HTTP) server

classes.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.config.Config

methods.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.config.Config.from_environ
documentation:
Deprecated, use get_config() instead.

Parses an environment dictionary and generates a config based on it

methods.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.config.Config.get_logger
documentation: Returns a logger

methods.name: ixoncdkingress.webserver.config.Config.get_signature_public_keys
documentation: Returns a cached instance of signature public keys
Configuration for the webserver

modules.name: ixoncdkingress.function.context
documentation: Context.

documentation: Describes an IXAPI resource.

classes.name: ixoncdkingress.function.context.FunctionContext

methods.name: ixoncdkingress.function.context.FunctionContext.agent_or_asset
documentation:
Return either an Agent or an Asset resource, depending on what's available. If both are
available in the context, returns the Asset resource.

methods.name: ixoncdkingress.function.context.FunctionContext.expose
documentation: Decorator to mark a function as an exposed endpoint.
The context for a Cloud Function.

modules.name: ixoncdkingress.function.objectstorage.types
documentation:
Types that can be used when implementing
the Object Storage interface.

Compatible with ayayot.objectstorage_v1

classes.name: ixoncdkingress.function.objectstorage.types.ResourceType
documentation: A type of resource for which a path is returned

classes.name: ixoncdkingress.function.objectstorage.types.PathData
documentation: Response data for a single path

classes.name: ixoncdkingress.function.objectstorage.types.PathMapping
documentation:
A mapping between a certain resource and a path,
as returned by authorize_list

classes.name: ixoncdkingress.function.objectstorage.types.PathResponse
documentation:
The expected type for a response for the
Object Storage authorize_upload, authorize_download &
authorize_delete APIs

classes.name: ixoncdkingress.function.objectstorage.types.ListPathResponse
documentation:
The expected type for a response for the
Object Storage authorize_list API

modules.name: ixoncdkingress.function.caller
documentation: Functions for finding and calling Cloud Functions.

functions.name: ixoncdkingress.function.caller.call_function
documentation:
Finds, loads and calls the function specified in the body. The content_type specifies the
format of the body.

database: Company PublicId
collection: Cloud Function PublicId

documentation: Update one or more documents that match the filter.

methods.name: ixoncdkingress.function.document_db_client.DocumentDBClient.delete_one

methods.name: ixoncdkingress.function.document_db_client.DocumentDBClient.find
documentation: Query the database.

methods.name: ixoncdkingress.function.document_db_client.DocumentDBClient.switch_collection
documentation:
Switch to another collection.

When collection_name is None or an empty string, the default collection is used
Class for a document db client, this client connects with a document database.

variables.name: ixoncdkingress.types.FunctionArguments
documentation: Arguments to the function.

classes.name: ixoncdkingress.types.ContentType

modules.name: ixoncdkingress.function.api_client
documentation: Contains code dealing with API clients

classes.name: ixoncdkingress.function.api_client.ApiClient

methods.name: ixoncdkingress.function.api_client.ApiClient._check_discovery
documentation:
Checks whether discovery has been run, and, if not, runs it.

Set verify on True when the certificate shouldn't be checked, which is the case when
the ApiClient has to talk to the envdev ixapi-server.

We don't expire the discovery as a new ApiClient instance is
created for every Cloud Function call.

methods.name: ixoncdkingress.function.api_client.ApiClient.set_custom_api_application
documentation: Modifies the Api-Application header used for API server requests.

methods.name: ixoncdkingress.function.api_client.ApiClient.get
documentation:
Performs a GET request on the API server, on the URL with the given
name

The URL names are found in the discovery

methods.name: ixoncdkingress.function.api_client.ApiClient.patch
documentation:
Performs a PATCH request on the API server, on the URL with the given
name

The URL names are found in the discovery

methods.name: ixoncdkingress.function.api_client.ApiClient.post
documentation:
Performs a POST request on the API server, on the URL with the given
name

The URL names are found in the discovery

methods.name: ixoncdkingress.function.api_client.ApiClient.options
documentation:
Performs an OPTIONS request on the API server, on the URL with the given
name

The URL names are found in the discovery

When using a browser, these are done automatically. When not using a browser,
these are not required

methods.name: ixoncdkingress.function.api_client.ApiClient.put
documentation:
Performs a PUT request on the API server, on the URL with the given
name

The URL names are found in the discovery

methods.name: ixoncdkingress.function.api_client.ApiClient.delete
documentation:
Performs a DELETE request on the API server, on the URL with the given
name

The URL names are found in the discovery

documentation: Sends a request to the API server

class_variables.name: ixoncdkingress.function.api_client.ApiClient._default_headers
